data.title: Liven AS - Consolidated unaudited interim report for the I quarter of 2026
data.description: A webinar will be held in Estonian on April 21st at 1:00 PM (EEST) to discuss the results. Further details can be found at www.liven.ee/investor. An English translation of the webinar will also be provided on the website.

data.title: Former MLB Players Lead Ember Sports Mobile App, Bringing Pro-Level Training to Athletes Everywhere
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama on April 21, 2026, MLB veterans are lauding a revolutionary platform as a significant advancement for athletes across all levels. Ember Sports, a sports technology company, is introducing elite baseball and softball training resources to athletes throughout the country via a cutting-edge mobile application. This development is heralded as a "game changer," promising enhanced opportunities for athletes to hone their skills and elevate their performance to professional standards.

data.title: Bureau of Dangerous Goods Introduces Monthly Public Lithium Battery Webinars
data.description: A company known as the Bureau of Dangerous Goods, Ltd. (BDG), specializing in hazardous materials training and compliance solutions, has introduced a new offering of monthly public webinars specifically focusing on lithium batteries. These webinars are designed for individuals and businesses seeking targeted, instructor-led training without the need to schedule a private group session. In addition to existing options such as self-paced online training and custom private sessions, BDG now provides this monthly public webinar as part of their lithium battery training program.

data.title: Spanish Mountain Gold Announces Sale of a 1.5% Royalty to Wheaton Precious Metals for US$55 Million
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: SPA) (FSE: S3Y) (OTCQB: SPAUF) has recently finalized a royalty agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. The agreement involves Wheaton acquiring a 1.5% net smelter returns royalty on gold and silver production from the Spanish Mountain Gold Project. In exchange for this royalty, Spanish Mountain Gold will receive US$5 million in cash. This partnership marks a significant development for the Project, showcasing the confidence and investment interest in its future prospects.
China’s March iron ore output declines 5.1% from a year earlier to 79.64 million metric tons, according to Stats Bureau.

data.title: Aave models 2 debt scenarios due to Kelp DAO exploit: 15% rsETH depeg risk in cheaper option, costlier alternative focuses losses at layer 2.
data.description: One option is significantly more affordable but carries the potential for rsETH to depeg by approximately 15%. The alternative choice is more expensive but provides enhanced security for the Ethereum mainnet and confines any losses to the layer 2 level.

data.title: Edge Home Finance Announces Strategic Investment from Presidio Investors and Promotion of Tom Ahles to President
data.description: Edge Home Finance, based in Minnetonka, recently received a strategic investment from Presidio Investors. This investment signifies a pivotal moment in the company’s growth within the mortgage broker sector. Tom Ahles has concurrently been appointed as the President of Edge Home Finance to bolster the firm's leadership during its upcoming growth phase. The significant investment from Presidio highlights a strong collaboration between the companies as Edge Home Finance advances in the industry.

data.title: NetDocuments appoints Kaleb Holden to drive further growth in the Asia-Pacific region
data.description: In Sydney, NetDocuments, a leading Document Management System (DMS) for legal professionals, has appointed Kaleb Holden as the new Head of Asia-Pacific (APAC). This move underscores NetDocuments' dedication to the APAC market and its strategy for ongoing expansion in the region. Kaleb brings over seven years of experience with NetDocuments, collaborating with legal professionals to improve document management and security. Moreover, he has been instrumental in encouraging responsible adoption of AI technology in legal practices.
China’s lead output declines 11.4% from a year earlier to 652,000 metric tons in March, according to Stats Bureau.

data.title: Cognizant Propels AI Workforce Training with Cognizant Skillspring™: New Talent Transformation Platform Designed to Accelerate Clients' Workforce AI Readiness
data.description: A cutting-edge platform has been introduced to aid organizations in attaining proficiency in artificial intelligence (AI). This platform is designed to ensure that employees are equipped with the necessary skills to meet the requirements of an economy driven by AI. Known as Skillspring, this innovative tool utilizes Cognizant's extensive experience in providing workforce training. By aligning workforce capabilities with the demands of AI, Skillspring enables outcome-based learning tailored to meet specific business goals.

data.title: New Alzheimer's Association Report: Americans Care Deeply About Brain Health but Most Don't Know How to Maintain It
data.description: The importance of maintaining brain health as people age is recognized by nearly 88% of U.S. adults, with 99% considering it as crucial as physical health. However, only a small 9% feel well-informed about brain health maintenance. Consequently, the number of individuals coping with clinical issues related to brain health is rising...

data.title: The Ad Council Elects 22 Members to Its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in New York, the Ad Council, a nonprofit organization known for driving social change through effective communication programs, appointed 22 new members to its Board of Directors during the biannual meeting. Rita, the chairperson, led the proceedings.
